backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a university portal system defining data types (UserProfile, AdmissionApplication, Course, FeeType, PaymentRecord, etc.) and state maps, with role-based access control helpers (requireAdmin, requireAdminOrStaff) and Stripe/HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (portal selection page, role-specific login pages, navigation updates) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of pages, hooks, components, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the University of Africa Portal React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that configures TanStack Router with all routes including public pages, portal selection, role-specific login pages (/login/student|staff|admin|parent), student/staff/admin/parent dashboards, and payment pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProfi: Displays the authenticated admin's profile information (principal ID, name, email, ID number) in a card with a copy-to-clipboard button for the principal. Shows a skeleton loader while data is fetching.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetup: Renders a form card for claiming the first admin account by submitting name, staff ID, and email via the bootstrapAdmin mutation. Shows an alert if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name, role, ID number, and email to create their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation. The role field is locked when a defaultRole prop is provided.
frontend/src/components/auth/RoleGuard.t: Wraps protected routes and renders children only if the authenticated user's profile matches the required role; otherwise shows loading skeletons, a login prompt, or an access-denied screen.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site-wide footer with university branding, quick navigation links, portal links (routing to login or dashboard based on auth state), and contact/social information.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that wraps all pages with the Navigation bar and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no saved profile.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Renders the top navigation bar with role-based links (student, admin, staff, parent) and a user dropdown menu supporting login/logout via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/payments/StripeS: Displays a setup card prompting admins to configure Stripe payment credentials (secret key and allowed countries) when Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: React component that protects routes by checking authentication state and the caller's user profile role, rendering loading spinners, a login prompt, or an unauthorized message as appropriate before rendering children.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, admin bootstrap, admissions, and Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a deep navy and gold academic color theme with CSS custom properties for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Renders the admin dashboard with a sidebar, summary stat cards (students, courses, fees, pending admissions), and quick-access service cards, with loading and error states.
One-time admin account setup page that checks authentication and existing admin status, showing the setup card or a redirect to the dashboard accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdmissionsManag: Admin page for listing, searching, and updating the status (admit/reject) of student admission applications, wrapped in a RoleGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/FeeManagementPa: Admin page for adding new fee types (name, amount, programme, session) and displaying existing fee types in a table, wrapped in a RoleGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HostelManagemen: Admin page for viewing, searching, and approving or rejecting hostel accommodation applications, wrapped in a RoleGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagingPage.t: Admin page for composing and sending broadcast announcements to targeted user roles (all, students, staff, parents), with a local history of sent messages displayed below the form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProgrammeManage: Admin page for adding new courses (code, name, semester, programme) and displaying the existing course list in a table, guarded by admin role.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ResultsManageme: Admin page for posting student academic results by selecting a student, course, semester, grade, and score, and viewing all posted results in a table.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StaffManagement: Admin page that fetches all user profiles, filters for staff members, and displays them in a table alongside a sidebar navigation for the admin panel.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StudentManageme: Admin page for registering new students (name, matric number, email) and listing all existing student profiles in a table, guarded by admin role.
A page that allows users to check their admission status by entering either a JAMB registration number or full name, displaying the result (admitted, rejected, or pending) with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: A landing page for the university admissions section, showing a hero banner, important dates, and a step-by-step guide to the admission process with links to apply or check admission status.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFormPage.t: A multi-step application form page where prospective students fill in personal info, JAMB details, O'Level results, programme choice, and upload documents before submitting their admission application.
frontend/src/pages/auth/RoleLoginPage.ts: Renders a role-specific login page (student, staff, admin, parent) using Internet Identity authentication, and redirects users to their appropriate dashboard after login based on their profile role.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The university home page displaying stats, available programmes, admission notices, and portal entry cards for students, staff, admins, and parents with role-aware navigation.
frontend/src/pages/parent/ParentDashboar: Parent dashboard page that allows a parent to link a student account by ID, fetch and display the linked student's results grouped by semester with GPA calculations, and shows loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: A simple page shown when a payment is cancelled or fails, informing the user no charges were made and providing links back to the fee statement or student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: A page that verifies a Stripe payment session after redirect, records the payment in the backend if successful, and displays success or error feedback with the payment reference.
frontend/src/pages/PortalSelectionPage.t: Displays a portal selection landing page with four role-based cards (Student, Staff, Admin, Parent) that navigate to the corresponding login route on click.
Staff dashboard page displaying summary stats (students, courses, results) and navigation service cards, with a sidebar for staff portal links and loading/error state handling.
frontend/src/pages/student/CourseRegistr: Student course registration page that fetches available courses, supports search filtering, groups courses by semester, and allows toggling registration status with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/student/FeeStatementP: Student fee statement page that displays total paid and outstanding balances, lists fee types and payment history, and initiates Stripe checkout sessions for unpaid fees.
frontend/src/pages/student/HostelApplica: Student page for submitting and viewing hostel accommodation applications, showing form fields for room type and session, and displaying current application status (pending/approved/rejected) with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/pages/student/PaymentHistor: Displays a student's full payment transaction history in a table with a total-paid summary card, supporting navigation to individual receipts.
frontend/src/pages/student/ReceiptPage.t: Renders a printable official payment receipt for a specific transaction, pulling payment and student profile data to display receipt details including amount, fee type, date, and reference.
frontend/src/pages/student/ResultsPage.t: Displays a student's academic results grouped by semester, showing course scores and grade badges, with a sidebar navigation for the student portal.
frontend/src/pages/student/StudentDashbo: Main student dashboard showing profile summary, quick-access service cards (courses, results, fees, hostel, transcript), unpaid fee alerts, and a sidebar navigation; handles loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/student/TranscriptPag: Student transcript page that fetches results and courses, groups them by semester, calculates GPA, and renders a printable academic transcript with student info and per-semester grade tables.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Utility functions for formatting Nigerian Naira amounts using Intl.NumberFormat, supporting both plain numbers and bigints from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/principal.ts: Utility function that truncates a long IC Principal string to a readable short form like 'xxxxx-xxxxx-...-cai'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold/success colors, serif/sans fonts, box shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, using oklch CSS variables.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking the university portal's architecture, existing features, and known issues including broken course/fee addition, unauthenticated menu visibility, and admin role-check failures.
